title: disterigma empetrifolium
intro: Disterigma empetrifolium, also known as the mountain pride, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the Philippines, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Disterigma empetrifolium include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
